plugins.name: in-english
plugins.description: Translates jargon-heavy tech/AI language into plain terms.

plugins.name: step-explainer
plugins.description: Builds an interactive HTML artifact that teaches a concept by simulating one concrete instance of it.

plugins.name: make-it-fun
plugins.description: Reframes a stressful upcoming task as a game instead of a life-or-death event, to defuse anxiety.

plugins.name: handover-webchat
plugins.description: Packages the current web chat conversation into a portable handover kit so a new chat can pick the work up cold.

plugins.name: get-started-webchat
plugins.description: Cold-starts a new web chat from a handover kit, reading it in the right order and getting straight back to work.
